clean_body: The radical Democrats finally revealed their plans to pack the Supreme Court. | Fellow Conservative, Here it comes - the radical Democrats finally revealed their plans to pack the Supreme Court. Despite their shameless efforts to sully and smear President Donald Trump’s three Supreme Court nominees, Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett , our former GOP U.S. Senate majority successfully confirmed all three. That’s left a Supreme Court with six Republican approved Justices and three Democrat - and Democrats know they need to have a majority to have their disastrous far-left agenda backstopped by the Court. This is a blatant power grab by the Democrats as they scheme to add FOUR more Liberal Justices to the Supreme Court! Their mentality is if they don’t have enough leftists on the Court to get their radical agenda approved then ... Pack the Supreme Court. Fellow Conservative, the Democrats don’t care about fairness or tradition - all they want to do is remove any obstacle to their endless transformation of America - just like they worked endlessly to destroy President Trump and his tremendous legacy of success. This is nothing short of a blatant power grab by the Democrats to dismantle all of our achievements and pave the way for forcing their “progressive” rule over an unwilling America - and it must be stopped. Sincerely, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails? e

I’m fighting back and will be out in front against this stupid idea.

clean_body: | | | | Far-left Democrats just released a proposal to “pack” the U.S. Supreme Court and add 4 new liberal Justices to it. Dear Peter, Far-left Democrats just released a proposal to “pack” the U.S. Supreme Court and add 4 new liberal Justices to it. As an Attorney General who litigates many cases before the Supreme Court, I can’t emphasize enough how damaging this far-left initiative is to our nation. One party legislative and executive rule isn’t enough for them! Now the far-left wants to overturn all of Trump’s work to rebuild the Courts. I’m fighting back and will be out in front against this stupid idea. Will you have my back as the media attacks me for fighting to protect the integrity of the Court? Thanks. Keep the faith, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Will you add your name to win back the Senate?
body:
Winning back the Senate is going to take every single one of us, and I'm asking for you to join our efforts today President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens.

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDEkS865-5801lCqI1JXrolq3QF4I60k2ZMZiZNVg_xji-g0o67pDKEC0V9qNUOdkKiLT98jXV0MO9znPfK450c2vmOkAZSWgd9mNsoEvmYrFzP8780WMQ_uqiBLVDyC4fM07spg-0hsm4iu_nFXnlKSp1MTmv9eIMA1kTbhH_Q83WMVASIrsGSRKSfP108krSCMzNC-OfEz4m-81QwlQasD)
---

Peter,

I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida - and for the next two years I have the honor of serving as the chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

In my job, I have one role: **[Take back the Senate from the far-Left Democrats and return some sanity to our country](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDFaCk3J0Q6pIC9AWljsIEc0kByxrFh-sIzK6TrgJQ-QUxTV8eeH8pi7jHSm73eS00_3zPjQ59-tNxwch3vUbZ9ZM2ja5mHH907T9_jFw-DoY_yOjNlsjsY21CO297IDKsrVytQJxD3XUgVkoZ_Yw1XtZAxI0LahGxfbhm-ll7sV1cKN8iBRABUIywSTITP9wA-ck_kosrzf5kRKzGFoqO0S)**.

I’m writing to you today to let you know about a conversation I recently had with former President Donald Trump. **My main takeaway from our meeting was how invested he is in seeing Republicans retake the Senate majority next year**.

**I told him that my team is working night and day to build the support we need to make it happen.**

**[That’s why before April 30th my team and I have set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to pledge their support to our efforts; taking back the Senate will be an “all hands-on deck” effort.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDEYrkmS8yj1y2Ozjuqhcj-1q70lWVTGh0aGP86YGgKtSy2-QUiqe-LIBxH7KDqNpSXtbk_8xTNP_T9Xc2UYoqBMfAkiQk9ksBod-msWm2ILr4LGrWcwyQc19fW7fddqpKEinvTsT_qJ3OD9H_IQ1QbSrO27ylNOZ_SowVSPgKMenvCKZWYKbcL6AGuGDGyZMevdaz0mBc7ZPkeoDC_uEG_G)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDG6A2mylH7WTvs7CENnUnwVBHEBTVkFUos8UIg-NGLWUr2WuWF5kfoqJJ3U41E6djevuR3RQ_mpuLnRVSNWQvWkl34Mc8QsmGcbj4tjjbcPynOBqDvQGvk8X-ASIEOq43Gl7PEDWKlVkE4VF_afkCLMobX4bIc85Tzmy2haqd9_Ie8oVB5HjbV9WLQ3I4z2QPHnipIETGKXYeTbJObVQy_B)
It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like hell to hold onto their 50-50 Senate majority; **Chuck Schumer is going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light.**

Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment and they will smear us every chance they get.

Think about what is at stake _IF_ Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster, if they don’t do it sooner;
2. They’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off
3. And Democrats will federalize elections; creating a permanent Democrat majority.

**Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the majority to take away the tie-breaking vote from Kamala Harris in the evenly divided Senate.**

**Victory is within reach – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country.**

I’m passionate about our shared conservative beliefs and **[I’m asking you to add your name to our petition today pledging your support to our cause.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDHQLhImDyTDJQp4R8hGdP0Jc0JEgl-AHlkv97FiwHfFZzz-d4_paAIIvMz4cKnH3s9eK0sjQHhEqhQGN_qb7XDADxvmKJ7P4SjkEaIP8_Cq-kPk7443S63ZV1m7l2lqb7ZnalLSh05pwwkPgBqWLn3vMYyq-E0-yzr4aahNsvsoYtORjNrrm2b2Ib3HiijR5GqG29krmbTTNDUxgtX3HHyQ)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDFdIEysXZnMqO8Wd69QHBGTMHLtDoHj8Y83gf9zfte9-QfOBg1SN_WxHhAIgMtaZpItD9NG0te7W8dGENmk0QsxBpCRIcjOGRQUOzf3J1qqH8_lSnhvK0uXBGz6UGL__KBjKtRmHZlsThWet9S1TAiF2l4z96xUYrZNOoQmN70Sa1F_kx4H9Y63SHz0ES0lto9Cr9ir5h-2i5e70rLHZe0a)
President Trump and I are counting on you. The future of our Republic is at stake.

Let's get this done!
Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)
NRSC Chairman

| [****SIGN OUR PETITION
TAKE BACK THE SENATE➔****](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=560ff5a252144474879c4c0049e9428a&_e=bn7fXoRYz8mROAWSGucsElhwsZJKsaXQb235X2P38zN08nsY-SmCMufjZcPMT33GuGrL-F638aDP2U_oT4LiOqb3E3cr_HOOzdW6Q7vo4JgCqOFBYGWuGNclkU_DVUl5clnGxOhMP9nIpdFNHVEAoqVWgWgN4luzL1qAZTR17wP3d-ElKkcQNhx5bTB8nQpuVd4njLh4MYem06yqMQgzWPs97iCynMY5A3IJL7X-Y-lyKiNxTCSTqRGlwmjNtGDVZquoNNkG9NJlzo-3aP2urXeX4XZ6VMj114o_IJWWIY8xIJLxCKkaCKtN9XZBWc26cPlZQopg_dkfZWjboiW8RPKdV-5KF4yZwzA4lO4B2PUK1Pno9ymB7l3_kLbLYs3-YLmSYYT532us6u5OaDAQEIYLF0Lx5W0LiKzmQ0nCBDHWWVxiH_GqfMWK-H9lGgjWmbOrRverFthf4zsa4pETWU_AEl45LJ1YY6qqPAyUYLl6ZeFZHCfg2xoFaBRjGX1aUJjUWJsbvGDWis0Rtcn6NzJJ04gVHdF7O4xAlMNHQGdmoLpYdQl4vn4TJwG6YehTjZlPCxmlGm7s59pGx14v2jpbzpV2Skm-4gPNFfrZazg567v16B2TsNPqEOiFu-Et)
